description: Micrometer 기반 JVM 모니터링 대시보드 (Spring Boot / Micronaut)

panels.description: 전체 CPU 중 GC에 소비된 시간 비율

targets.expr: sum(rate(jvm_gc_pause_seconds_sum{application="$application", instance="$instance"}[1m])) by (application, instance) / on(application, instance) system_cpu_count

panels.title: GC 부하

title: Q-Asker API Server Compute — JVM (Micrometer)
